keyFeatures.en: Edit, unlock, and merge PDF files
Export PDF files to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, JPG

description.en: Convert, edit, unlock, merge, and export files to various formats. No monthly credits limit.
description.zh: 转换、编辑、解锁、合并和导出各种格式的文件。没有每月积分限制

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of commercial use limitations
weaknesses.zh: 未明确说明商业使用限制

positioning.en: A comprehensive online PDF tool with many features
positioning.zh: 一款功能全面的在线PDF工具
